description: Cron registry for Kupuri OMA agents. Read on session restart to recreate all scheduled jobs. Times are UTC.

crons.name: Keep-alive ping
crons.prompt: Check agent channels are active. Process any pending Beads tasks. Emit heartbeat to ops/reports/heartbeat.json.

crons.name: Community feed ingest
crons.prompt: Run ingest-worker against content/community-seed/ to pick up any new seed projects. Write report to ops/reports/. Maximum 50 new records per run.

crons.name: Translation quality sweep
crons.prompt: Run translation-worker QA sweep. Check coverage >= 90%. Flag any project below threshold. Write report to ops/reports/translation_{date}.json.

crons.name: SYNTHIA daily architecture audit
crons.prompt: Run oma_score_architecture MCP tool against all active packages. Flag any score below 8.5. Write report to ops/reports/synthia_{date}.json.

crons.name: Self-improvement cycle
crons.prompt: Pull highest-priority Beads task. Extract patterns from ops/reports/ into ops/reports/patterns.md. Update failure_patterns.md. Emit daily summary if > 3 tasks completed.
